item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 9min BATES NAILS THE NINE!
Owen Bates produces perfection in Wigan!
The 23-year-old lands a
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 9min BATES NAILS THE NINE!
Owen Bates produces perfection in Wigan!
The 23-year-old lands a nine-darter during his tie against Adam Gawlas in the ET7 Tour Card Holder Qualifier!
http:// bit.ly/26ET7TCHQ 3 3 32 2 mil

item.title: stuartpykesport: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 21min It’s four years ago today since we lost a great colleague and an even greater mate
item.description: Stuart Pyke @stuartpykesport · 21min It’s four years ago today since we lost a great colleague and an even greater mate ….. Nigel Pearson ….. miss the guy + thinking of his family 1 12 501

item.title:
philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 31min 'I was shocked. Maybe that was the game plan with Fergal to try and cabbage me.'
Interes
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 31min 'I was shocked. Maybe that was the game plan with Fergal to try and cabbage me.'
Interesting from Dave Gilbert on Aaron Hill's approach in their Judgement Day clash.
The Angry Farmer had some advice for his opponent. De metro.co.uk 1 1 5 681

item.title: OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 47min Tour Card Holder Qualifiers for European Tour Events 7-8 are taking place in Wigan this a
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 47min Tour Card Holder Qualifiers for European Tour Events 7-8 are taking place in Wigan this afternoon!
The ET7 Qualifier is already underway, with ten spots available in next month's International Darts Open...
http:// bit.ly/26ET7TCHQ 2 1 22 9 mil
